Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Champion’s Guild]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Of Sea and Shadow ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 17''' — The Champions are members of the Champion’s Guild.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 20''' — Urzaia Woodsman was a former member of the Champion's Guild.}}

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 5''' — The Champion's Guild uses the Golden Crown as its symbol.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 9''' — The Champion’s Guild is headquartered in Axciss.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 22''' — Baldesar Kern is the Head of the Champion's Guild.}}

== Of Kings and Killers ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 3''' — The Champion’s Guild provides blood samples for alchemical research.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 4''' — Petal found a research position in the Champion’s Guild.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 4''' — The Champion’s Guild is not fully behind Calder and has largely dispersed.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 6''' — The Champion’s Guild is one of the groups most affected by the departure of the alchemists.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 17''' — Petal spent time in the Champion's Guild.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 17''' — The Champion's Guild has alchemists.}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 4''' — The Champion’s Guild provides open security for the Imperialist side.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 6''' — The Head of the Champion’s Guild is a broad man with silver in his black hair.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 6''' — The Head of the Champion’s Guild carries a leather satchel and two maces.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
